scope_slice: Full implementation of collapsible menu and prompt shortcut area
sequence_rationale: 1. Intake & Spec (Done) 2. State & i18n Data Layer (Added Category Persistence) 3. UI Shell (Toolbar Collapse) 4. Shortcut Area Logic (with load-guard filtering) 5. Quality Gate Verification
verification_plan: Verify TK-UI-001~004, TK-PL-001~006, TK-ST-001~003, TK-I18N-001 via manual extension testing in browser.
fallback: Revert UI changes in toolbar.js and styles.css
